mnemonics: Mother Never Leaves The Kitchen Without Snacks
My Nurse Loves To Keep Everything Sorted
keyPoints: A function is a relation between a set of inputs (called the domain) and a set of possible outputs (called the range).
A function is one-to-one if each input corresponds to exactly one output.
A function is one-to-one if f(x) = f(y) implies x = y for all x, y in the domain.
